titleStmt.title: SII 10.773: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 773. (A.R. No. 427 of 1923.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE BACK WALL OF THE RUINED TEMPLE OF PRASANNAYYA, BOLLAVARAM, NANDIKOTKURU TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1619. (Īśvara)

summary.p: Records the gift of land by Gōparāju Prasannayya, Sthala-karaṇam of Bollavaram, to Kṛishṇayya, Karaṇam of Prōlukallu while Aurang Pādshā was ruling at Āmudānagaram, another name for Hastināpuram (Delhi).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1619 Agu nēṭi yīśvarasaṁvatsara . kārtika śu 12 lu śrīmanmahārāja rājādhi
rāja śrīAvaraṁgapāduśāsāhēbuluvāru hastināpuraṁ pratināma maina Āmudānagara
maṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhu lai pṛthivi sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu kāśyapagōtra Āpastaṁbasū
tra yajuśyākhādhyāyu laina bolavaraṁ sthalakaraṇaṁ gōparājuvāri vaṁśōdbhavu laina prasa nnayaṁgā
ri pautṛlaina pāparāju putṛḍaina prasnayagāru vasiṣṭhagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtra yaju [¨rgvu]śākhādhyā
yu laina prōlukaṁṭṭi sthaḷakaraṇaṁ veṁkaṭādri pautṛ ḍaina veṁggaya putṛ ḍaina kṛṣṇayaku bhūdānadharma
śilāśāsanaṁ nēnu bollavarāna kāśīviśvanāthuni pratiṣṭhacēsi dēvālayaṁ kūpa
pratiṣṭha nāḍu māku celli vaccē bolavaraṁgrāmāna daṁḍumānyaṁ naḍmiṁṭi kolapāṭi rēgaḍa na 2
yidmu mīku dhārabōśi yistimi trikaraṇātrivācakatriśudhigānu dhārabōśi yi
stimi ganuka mīputrapautrapāraṁparyaṁttaṁ Āceṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu Anubha
viṁccēdi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattā putrikā dhātrī pitṛdattā ca sōdarī pa
radattā gurōḥ patnī vipradattā vasuṁdharā .
Digital edition of SII 10.773 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
